meta.title: Días y Meses
meta.subtitle: Days of the week and months

learningOutcomes: Name all 7 days of the week
Name all 12 months of the year

steps.title: Time Talk
steps.body:
📅 Days and months are essential for making plans, scheduling, and understanding when things happen!

Fun fact: Spanish days are NOT capitalized like in English.

steps.title: Days of the Week
steps.body:
The Spanish week starts on Monday:

• **lunes** - Monday (from 'luna' - moon) 🌙
• **martes** - Tuesday (from Mars)
• **miércoles** - Wednesday (from Mercury)
• **jueves** - Thursday (from Jupiter)
• **viernes** - Friday (from Venus) 🎉

steps.title: The Weekend
steps.body:
The best days! 🎊

• **sábado** - Saturday (from Sabbath)
• **domingo** - Sunday (from 'Lord's day')

**El fin de semana** = The weekend
steps.audioPhrase: sábado, domingo. El fin de semana.

steps.title: Using Days in Sentences
steps.body:
Use **el** before a specific day:

• **El lunes trabajo** - On Monday I work
• **El viernes es la fiesta** - The party is on Friday

For repeated days, use **los**:
• **Los martes estudio** - On Tuesdays I study
steps.audioPhrase: El lunes trabajo. Los martes estudio español.

steps.title: Months: January - June
steps.body:
• **enero** - January
• **febrero** - February
• **marzo** - March
• **abril** - April
• **mayo** - May
• **junio** - June
steps.audioPhrase: enero, febrero, marzo, abril, mayo, junio

steps.title: Months: July - December
steps.body:
• **julio** - July
• **agosto** - August
• **septiembre** - September
• **octubre** - October
• **noviembre** - November
• **diciembre** - December 🎄
steps.audioPhrase: julio, agosto, septiembre, octubre, noviembre, diciembre

steps.title: Saying Dates
steps.body:
Dates use **el + number + de + month**:

• **El 25 de diciembre** - December 25th
• **El 1 de enero** - January 1st
• **El 14 de febrero** - February 14th 💕

For 'first', use **primero**: El primero de mayo
steps.audioPhrase: El veinticinco de diciembre. El primero de enero.

steps.title: Practice: Saying a Date
steps.phrase: Hoy es viernes, el 15 de marzo
steps.audioPhrase: Hoy es viernes, el quince de marzo

steps.title: 🎉 ¡Perfecto!
steps.body:
You can now talk about days and dates in Spanish! This is incredibly useful for scheduling.

**Practice:** What day is your birthday in Spanish?
